TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tuki, title = tuki, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tuki} }

S.FORM: tuki(Hulam a kamu: ÊôÇÈêò) Tusa ku zinum nu tuki, cacay ku tanayaay, cacay ku apuyuay. Kalamkam ku culil nu tanayaay a zinum, cacay a demiad tusa a bataan izaw ku sepat misaliyut. Mahaymaw ku culil nu apuyuay a zinum, cacay a demiad kina tusa misaliyut. Nanu sananal katukuh tu labi, cayay kasa tezep muculil.
S.PHON: tuki(ƒßur~…æam a kamu: **) tusa ku zinum nu tuki, ¶a ¶aj ku tanajaaj, ¶a ¶aj ku apujuaj. kar~…æamkam ku ¶ur~…æir~…æ nu tanajaaj a zinum, ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad tusa a bataan izaw ku s…ôpat misar~…æijut. maƒßajmaw ku ¶ur~…æir~…æ nu apujuaj a zinum, ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad kina tusa misar~…æijut. nanu sananar~…æ katukuƒß tu r~…æabi, ¶ajaj kasa t…ôz…ôp mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ.
S.FORM: tuki(Hulam a kamu: ÊôÇÈêò) Tusa ku zinum nu tuki, cacay ku tanayaay, cacay ku apuyuay. Kalamkam ku culil nu tanayaay a zinum, cacay a demiad tusa a bataan izaw ku sepat misaliyut. Mahaymaw ku culil nu apuyuay a zinum, cacay a demiad kina tusa misaliyut. Nanu sananal katukuh tu labi, cayay kasa tezep muculil.
